title: PM Workfront Task Review Drillthrough
objective: Add a focused PM workfront ergonomics path from PM-review task rows into the existing PM approval task-review detail route, preserving return context back to PM workfront and zero mutation behavior until an explicit PM disposition action.
orchestration_inputs: PM Lane 012 remains the deployment gate for hosted mutation-seam parity and live PM proof.
The coordinator selected workfront-to-approval task review drillthrough as the next local PM ergonomics slice after PM Lane 021.
Read-only product scout 019e2cbe-0084-7083-8f3a-87dfbccb79ec confirmed the link should route with screen=task-review, detailId=<task id>, returnTo=/pm-review/workfront, and returnLabel=PM workfront.
Read-only governance scout 019e2cbe-00d2-7411-b5a1-65a81ee72d78 confirmed PM Lane 022 should remain a local frontend-only PM runtime lane with PM Lane 012 preserved as the hosted parity gate.
Coordinator execution kept write ownership local to the workfront page, focused browser proof, and governance surfaces while scouts ran as parallel read-only lanes.
constrained_outputs: Workfront rows with task_id and PM review posture now expose a focused Review task link.
The link routes to /pm-review/approval with screen=task-review, detailId=<task id>, returnTo=/pm-review/workfront, and returnLabel=PM workfront.
The link is gated on row.task_id plus readiness=pm_review or status=awaiting_review so blocked, unassigned, and non-review rows do not expose task approval drillthrough.

The focused PM workfront smoke now mocks approval task reads, asserts the Review task href, clicks into approval task review, verifies the task detail, verifies Return to PM workfront, and returns without mutation calls.

Existing read-only advisory, scoped decision-history, workfront drillthrough return coverage, escalation approval drillthrough, taskless-row coverage, lens filters, and PM-clicked return-to-lead proof remain intact.

CI=1 corepack pnpm --dir C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform --filter @apex/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.approval-context.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: focused PM workfront Playwright proof passed 1/1
